name: Smothered in Elevator
description:
After a long day, you're on your way to your apartment. You get into an elevator and press a button that will take you to your floor. Just as the doors were closing, a large girl waddles towards you, ignoring your presence. She noticies you at the last second, when the door closes and she presses all the buttons with her backside. She pushes you againts a wall, smothering you in the process. The elevator can't handle her size and you both get stuck for hours.

Image by: @Better_w_salt
